description: Perform an OTIF (On-Time In-Full) analysis on the supply chain order data in /home/ga/Documents/supply_chain_orders.xlsx. On the 'Order_Data' sheet, calculate 'Days_Variance' (Actual_Ship_Date minus Expected_Ship_Date), 'Is_On_Time' (Yes if variance is 0 or less), 'Is_In_Full' (Yes if Shipped_Qty >= Ordered_Qty), and 'OTIF_Status' (OTIF if both conditions are Yes). Create a 'Department_Summary' sheet with a summary table for the Apparel, Outdoors, Electronics, and Footwear departments including 'Total_Orders', 'OTIF_Orders', and 'OTIF_Percentage'. Format the 'OTIF_Percentage' column as a percentage and apply conditional formatting to highlight values less than 90% with a red background. Sort the summary table by 'Total_Orders' in descending order and save the workbook.

metadata.data_source: DataCo Smart Supply Chain Dataset (Real Enterprise Subset)
